pr.title: Render My Work cards from structured summary fields
pr.body:
## What

The PR and to-do cards now read title/what/why/impact and title/summary/next_step from the DTO. Deletes the What-changed regex convention.

Closes #155.

pr_summary.title: Render My Work cards from structured summary fields
pr_summary.what: Rewrote the PR and to-do cards to render the structured summary columns directly and removed the old What-changed regex.
pr_summary.why: The regex broke whenever the summary prose drifted from its expected shape.
pr_summary.impact: My Work cards now show a stable humanized title, what changed, and a next step without brittle parsing.

pr.title: Widen captured event raw with PR base.ref and issue milestone
pr.body: Records the PR base branch and the issue milestone title/due_on at capture so My Work can render them with no live GitHub call.

pr_summary.title: Capture PR base branch and issue milestone in the event
pr_summary.what: Widened the captured event raw to include the PR base.ref and the issue milestone title and due date.
pr_summary.why: My Work needed those fields to render footers and milestone chips without a render-time GitHub call.
pr_summary.impact: Cards can now show 'into main' and a milestone with its due date entirely from D1.

pr.title: Milestone progress bars on the Roadmap page
pr.body: Each milestone renders a closed/total bar from the stored progress cache.

pr_summary.title: Add milestone progress bars to the Roadmap
pr_summary.what: Rendered a closed/total progress bar per milestone from the stored progress cache.
pr_summary.impact: The Roadmap now shows how far each milestone is along at a glance.

pr.title: Roadmap FTS so query() stops being roadmap-blind
pr.body: Adds a standalone roadmap_fts over the plan narrative and milestones.

pr_summary.title: Index the roadmap for search
pr_summary.what: Added a standalone roadmap_fts virtual table over the plan narrative and milestones and wired it into query().
pr_summary.why: Search returned docs, decisions, and feed but never surfaced roadmap items.
pr_summary.impact: Searching now finds milestones and the plan narrative alongside everything else.

pr.title: Scheduled progress recompute backstop
pr.body: A cron recomputes milestone progress off the render path in case a webhook delivery is missed.

pr_summary.title: Add a scheduled progress recompute backstop
pr_summary.what: Added a cron that recomputes milestone progress off the render path using absolute closed/total counts.
pr_summary.why: A missed webhook delivery could leave milestone progress stale.
pr_summary.impact: Progress self-heals within the cron interval even if a webhook is dropped.

pr.title: Constant-time MCP token comparison
pr.body: Replaces the early-return string compare flagged in #138. Adds a timing test.

pr_summary.title: Compare MCP tokens in constant time
pr_summary.what: Switched bearer-token comparison to a constant-time check and added a timing test that fails on the old code.
pr_summary.why: The early-return string compare in #138 leaked timing information.
pr_summary.impact: Token verification no longer leaks a timing side channel.

pr.title: Spike: Durable Object session cache for MCP
pr.body: Abandoned — the stateless per-request server is simpler and the SDK guards reuse.

pr_summary.title: Close the Durable Object MCP session spike
pr_summary.what: Closed the spike that explored caching MCP sessions in a Durable Object without merging.
pr_summary.why: The stateless per-request server proved simpler and the SDK already guards against reuse.

issue.title: [P0] Bearer token revoke + audit endpoint
issue.body: Revoke a bearer token from Settings (hash-match then soft-delete) and record the revocation in the audit log.

issue_summary.title: Bearer token revoke and audit endpoint
issue_summary.summary: Add a Settings action that revokes a bearer token by hash-matching then soft-deleting it, and records the revocation.
issue_summary.next_step: Wire the revoke route to the audit log write and cover it with a hash-match test.

issue.title: [P1] Per-token audit log query
issue.body: Expose a queryable read trail of every MCP write, filterable by token.

issue_summary.title: Per-token audit log query
issue_summary.summary: Provide a read trail of every MCP write that can be filtered by the token that made it.
issue_summary.next_step: Design the audit row shape and add a token-scoped query behind the session gate.

issue.title: [P1] read-plan: diff the plan against captured events
issue.body: read-plan should check the authored roadmap against captured events and stored progress, flagging drift.

issue_summary.title: read-plan diffs the plan against reality
issue_summary.summary: Have the read-plan skill compare the authored roadmap to captured events and stored progress and report where they diverge.
issue_summary.next_step: Enumerate the milestone github_refs and compare their event-derived progress to the authored status.

issue.title: [P2] Namespace Sapling and Canopy slugs in Search
issue.body: Sapling lesson slugs and Canopy doc slugs collide in Search results. Namespace them so a query can disambiguate.

issue_summary.title: Namespace Sapling and Canopy slugs in Search
issue_summary.summary: Disambiguate colliding lesson and doc slugs in Search results by namespacing them per space.

issue.title: [P2] Vectorize spike for semantic search
issue.body: Prototype a semantic candidate stream and merge it with FTS via Reciprocal Rank Fusion.

issue_summary.title: Vectorize spike for semantic search
issue_summary.summary: Prototype a Vectorize-backed semantic candidate stream and fuse it with the existing FTS results.
issue_summary.next_step: Stand up a throwaway Vectorize index and compare RRF-fused results against FTS-only on a few queries.

issue.title: [P3] Docs: self-host guide outline
issue.body: Draft an outline for running the whole store on your own Cloudflare account.

issue_summary.title: Outline the self-host guide
issue_summary.summary: Sketch the sections a self-host guide needs: provisioning D1, setting secrets, applying migrations, and deploying.
issue_summary.next_step: List the required secrets and bindings as the first section.

pr_summary.title: Fix a typo in the onboarding doc
pr_summary.what: Corrected a one-line typo in the onboarding documentation.

pr.title: Bump lesson schema validator to v3
pr.body: Upgrades the MDX frontmatter validator in the Sapling content pipeline.

pr_summary.title: Bump the lesson schema validator to v3
pr_summary.what: Upgraded the MDX frontmatter validator used by the content pipeline to v3.
pr_summary.impact: Lessons are now validated against the newer frontmatter schema.
